title: Cotto & Frullato Z: The Crystal Gear
original_title: Cotto & Frullato Z: The Crystal Gear
overview: Maurizio Merluzzo is a web chef who believes that there is no better way to enjoy food than blending it. During the last episodes of his web series, a psychopathic hater named Nino 666 kidnaps him. Trapped in an artificial world, our hero will try to free himself and get revenge with the help of bizarre characters.
